Name: Palácio da Pena
Tips: Candy-colored romantic palace. Pre-book a strict timed entry slot.

Name: Castelo dos Mouros
Tips: 8th-century Moorish walls. Huge views back over Pena and the coast.

Name: Casa Piriquita
Tips: Travesseiros and queijadas. Sintra institution since 1862.

Name: Quinta da Regaleira
Tips: Initiation Well - 27m spiral descent. Bring your phone torch.

Name: Cascais
Tips: Marina walk, Boca do Inferno sea-arch, fish dinner on the front.
